default.tailwind: w-full px-3 py-2 text-base border border-slate-300 rounded-lg focus:ring-2 focus:ring-primary-500/50 caret-primary-500

error.tailwind: w-full px-3 py-2 text-base border border-red-300 rounded-lg focus:ring-2 focus:ring-red-500/50 bg-red-50

disabled.tailwind: w-full px-3 py-2 text-base border border-slate-200 rounded-lg bg-slate-100 text-slate-400 cursor-not-allowed

success.tailwind: w-full px-3 py-2 text-base border border-emerald-300 rounded-lg focus:ring-2 focus:ring-emerald-500/50
